items.name: No rule contradictions

The conflict resolution assumes this is outdated, but if it is a forward-looking plan note dated after 9/7/2025, it would mean D2D is expected to revert to Installed ba

items.name: No low-confidence rules
items.gapDescription: decelerator-outbound-below-quota (0.6): Outbound Partner channel applies a penalty for performance b; draw-recoverable (0.6): Recoverable draw exists for certain Employee plans. OTM part; d2d-internal-director-comp (0.65): D2D Director internal employee compensation with three weigh
items.suggestedAction: Review low-confidence rules — provide clearer source data or confirm correctness

items.name: Source data verified
items.gapDescription: rate-accuracy-digital-rate-table: Digital.xlsx Digital Rate Table source data shows Sales ID 20,001,125 and 20,001,126 at $475 New Install Fiber / $380 New Install Copper, and 20,001,129 and 20,001,135 at $350 / $250. The extracted rule states Fiber new-install bounties range from $90 (Acquisition)
items.suggestedAction: Review and correct source data mismatches
